channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Heat wave threatens July 4th events; Russia strikes Ukraine's capital
item.description: July 4th celebrations for America's milestone birthday are threatened by a severe heat wave. Meanwhile, Russia has struck Ukraine's capital, killing several...

item.title: Former USAID head mourns closure, hopes for future of foreign aid
item.description: A former USAID administrator reflects on the agency's shutdown a year ago and the new direction of U.S. foreign aid.

item.title: Coffee first: The drink that fueled the American Revolution
item.description: Colonial Americans drank coffee long before the Boston Tea Party or the Revolutionary War. The establishments that serve...

item.title: New parents or expecting? Share your cost experiences and questions
item.description: The cost of having a baby in the U.S. is often unpredictable. We invite your stories and questions on managing these expenses.
